# ConstantSEO

> ConstantSEO by Constant Labs is Dubai's AI-powered SEO agency. We use agentic AI to build, optimize, and dominate search for businesses across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and GCC region — on Google, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and every platform that matters.

## Services

- **AI Search Optimization (GEO/AEO)**: Optimize your brand to be recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude when users ask AI for recommendations. Generative Engine Optimization and Answer Engine Optimization for GCC businesses.
- **Technical SEO**: Core Web Vitals, schema markup, crawlability, site speed, and technical audit fixes.
- **Arabic Content Strategy**: Native Arabic SEO content with proper RTL optimization and Arabic keyword research by native speakers.
- **Local SEO**: Google Maps (Google Business Profile) optimization, local citations, and geo-targeted content for Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Jeddah, and Muscat.
- **AI-Powered Link Building**: Strategic backlink acquisition using AI to identify high-authority opportunities in GCC and global publications.
- **SEO Audits & Analytics**: Comprehensive AI-driven audits with real-time dashboards tracking rankings across Google AND AI platforms.
- **Website Development**: SEO-first websites built with agentic AI — 50+ optimized pages deployed in days.
- **Conversion Rate Optimization**: Data-driven CRO to turn search traffic into revenue.

## Contact

- Email: akhmad@constantlabs.ai
- Phone: +971 56 149 5656
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/971561495656
- Location: Dubai, Al Awir, UAE
- Business Hours: Sunday–Thursday, 9AM–6PM GST

## Markets Served

- Primary: UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah)
- Secondary: Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam)
- Tertiary: Oman (Muscat)
- Languages: English and Arabic (native speakers)

## Pricing

- Starter: AED 1,500/month — 15 keywords, monthly audit, technical fixes
- Growth: AED 3,500/month — 50 keywords, weekly optimization, Arabic content, local SEO
- Enterprise: AED 7,500/month — unlimited keywords, dedicated strategist, full GCC coverage

## Key Differentiators

1. AI-native approach: agentic AI builds 50+ SEO pages in hours, not months
2. First GEO/AEO specialist in the GCC region
3. True bilingual EN+AR SEO — native Arabic speakers, not machine translation
4. Dubai-based team with deep GCC market expertise
5. Good foundational SEO equals good GEO — no separate AI strategy needed
